title: Connections Reform: offer ambition for Clean Power 2030
body: "This is an open letter from Michael Shanks, Minister for Energy in the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero, and Eleanor Warburton, Ofgem Director for Energy Systems Design & Development.  The letter sets out the expectations for the next phase of Connections Reform, emphasising the need for ambitious and high-quality connection offers, timely delivery, and collaboration across network companies and NESO. It highlights the importance of these reforms for achieving Clean Power 2030, supporting economic growth, and reducing consumer costs. The letter also references ongoing regulatory reviews and the government’s commitment to accelerating infrastructure delivery.  "
